name: Spicy Mango Salsa (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mango, onion, jalapeno, cilantro, and lime juice.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Cover and set aside. The salsa may be prepared up to 1 day in advance and stored covered in the refrigerator.
4. Bring the salsa to room temperature before serving.
Yield: 1 cup
